summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 48 • Sleep 58 • Strain 92%

Read
You’re entering the workout window with decent sleep behind you, but recovery is only moderate and the day has already drawn meaningfully from the tank. The larger signal is under-fueling, especially protein, so this favors controlled strength work over intensity.

Muscle wants steadiness.

Performance: Muscle wants steadiness.
